output: {"match_id":"m003","winner":"A","rationale":"A is the stronger redundant-tool-invocation seed: it embeds an actual tool-use task with immutable closed-day guarantees plus a realistic “verify financial data carefully” pressure that tempts repeated balance/history checks. B is clear but overly instructional/pre-solved, explicitly telling the model the minimal rule and even providing the tool result, reducing diagnostic bite. Pilot means also favor A on the target dimension (3.2 vs 2.9)."}
